_meta.purpose: Source-of-truth prompts for menu product images. Edit subjects here, then regenerate via `codex exec` using the imagegen skill. Keep style + backdrop + constraints identical across items so the menu grid reads as one cohesive set.
_meta.generator: codex exec --sandbox workspace-write --skip-git-repo-check '<prompt>' (uses built-in image_gen via ~/.codex/skills/.system/imagegen/SKILL.md)
_meta.model_notes: gpt-image-2 via codex built-in image_gen tool

shared.style: Photorealistic overhead 3/4 product photography, bright airy soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, high-key exposure.
shared.backdrop: A VERY PALE, almost whitewashed light-oak wood surface — bleached blonde wood, near off-white, low-contrast grain. Imagine a sun-bleached Scandinavian cafe table, NOT a warm honey or medium-oak tone. The wood should read as cream/ivory in the final image. A soft out-of-focus leaf shadow in the upper-left corner, gentle and low-contrast.
shared.composition: Subject centered with comfortable padding, square 1024x1024.
shared.constraints: No logos, no text, no watermark, no hands, no extra props beyond what is specified. Background must be light and airy, NOT warm orange or honey-toned wood.

latte.name: Latte
latte.subject: a hot latte in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), warm espresso-tinted milk with a delicate white milk foam latte-art rosetta on top, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

iced-latte.name: Iced Latte
iced-latte.subject: an iced latte in a tall clear straight-sided glass with visible ice cubes, dark espresso swirling into milk, fine condensation on the glass. No straw, no saucer.

americano.name: Americano
americano.subject: a hot americano in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), deep dark coffee with a thin natural crema ring on top, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

iced-americano.name: Iced Americano
iced-americano.subject: an iced americano in a tall clear straight-sided glass with visible ice cubes, deep dark coffee, fine condensation on the glass. No milk, no straw.

cappuccino.name: Cappuccino
cappuccino.subject: a hot cappuccino in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), generous thick foam dome dusted with fine cocoa powder, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

mocha.name: Mocha
mocha.subject: a hot mocha in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), espresso and chocolate with milk foam, a few cocoa shavings on top, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

espresso.name: Espresso
espresso.subject: a single espresso shot in a small white ceramic demitasse cup (no saucer), rich dark coffee with a hazel crema, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

flat-white.name: Flat White
flat-white.subject: a hot flat white in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), velvety microfoam with a clean tulip latte-art pattern, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

sig-latte.name: Signature Latte
sig-latte.subject: a signature specialty latte in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), warm caramel-toned milk with intricate elaborate latte-art (multi-leaf rosetta or swan), a faint drizzle of caramel on the foam, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

matcha-latte.name: Matcha Latte
matcha-latte.subject: a hot matcha latte in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), vivid bright-green matcha with delicate white milk foam latte-art leaf pattern on top, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

thai-tea.name: Thai Iced Tea
thai-tea.subject: a Thai iced tea in a tall clear straight-sided glass with visible ice cubes, the bottom layer a vivid orange tea and the top a layer of poured white evaporated milk creating a clean two-tone gradient, fine condensation on the glass. No straw.

chamomile.name: Chamomile
chamomile.subject: a chamomile tea in a small clear glass cup (no saucer), pale golden infusion with a few small chamomile flower buds floating on the surface, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

earl-grey.name: Earl Grey
earl-grey.subject: an earl grey tea in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), deep amber-brown tea with a subtle natural sheen, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

green-tea.name: Green Tea
green-tea.subject: a green tea in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), pale yellow-green infusion with a clean clear surface, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

oolong.name: Oolong
oolong.subject: an oolong tea in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), warm amber-gold tea with a faint natural sheen, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.

croissant.name: Croissant
croissant.subject: a fresh golden-brown butter croissant with visibly flaky shiny layers and a few crumbs, resting directly on the wood backdrop (no plate, no parchment).

pain-au-choc.name: Pain au choc
pain-au-choc.subject: a fresh golden-brown pain au chocolat (rectangular flaky pastry) with two slim batons of dark chocolate visible at the ends, a few crumbs, resting directly on the wood backdrop (no plate, no parchment).

banana-bread.name: Banana Bread
banana-bread.subject: a single thick slice of homemade banana bread with a golden-brown crust and visible moist crumb, a few small crumbs scattered, resting directly on the wood backdrop (no plate, no parchment).

almond-danish.name: Almond Danish
almond-danish.subject: a single almond danish pastry with a flaky pinwheel or oval shape, glossy glaze, topped with sliced almonds and a light dusting of powdered sugar, resting directly on the wood backdrop (no plate, no parchment).

muffin.name: Blueberry Muffin
muffin.subject: a single homemade blueberry muffin in a natural-colored paper liner, golden-brown crusty top with visible whole blueberries peeking through, resting directly on the wood backdrop.

fresh-orange.name: Fresh Orange
fresh-orange.subject: a freshly squeezed orange juice in a tall clear straight-sided glass, bright vivid orange juice with fine pulp visible, no ice, no garnish. A small thin orange slice on the rim of the glass.

sparkling.name: Sparkling Water
sparkling.subject: sparkling water in a tall clear straight-sided glass, crystal-clear water full of fine rising bubbles, fine condensation on the glass. No ice, no garnish.

cold-brew.name: Cold Brew
cold-brew.subject: a cold brew coffee in a tall clear straight-sided glass with visible large ice cubes, deep dark coffee (no milk), fine condensation on the glass. No straw.

smoothie.name: Berry Smoothie
smoothie.subject: a berry smoothie in a tall clear straight-sided glass, thick deep-purple-pink smoothie with a few whole blueberries and a raspberry resting on top. No straw, no whipped cream.

affogato.name: Affogato
affogato.subject: an affogato in a small clear glass cup (no saucer), a generous scoop of creamy vanilla gelato with a fresh shot of dark espresso being poured over creating melt streaks down the side of the scoop, glass resting directly on the wood backdrop.

dirty-matcha.name: Dirty Matcha
dirty-matcha.subject: a dirty matcha latte in a tall clear straight-sided glass with visible ice cubes, a clean two-tone layer with vivid bright-green matcha milk on the bottom and a dark espresso 'dirty' pour creating dark swirls on top, fine condensation on the glass. No straw.

honey-latte.name: Honey Oat Latte
honey-latte.subject: a honey oat latte in a small off-white ceramic cup (no saucer), warm honey-toned oat milk coffee with a delicate latte-art heart, a thin amber drizzle of honey on the foam, cup resting directly on the wood backdrop.
